kiro.name: Kiro AI
kiro.deprecation_notice: ⚠️ Risk Notice: This provider uses a subscription/OAuth session not officially licensed for proxy/router use. Account may be restricted or banned. Use at your own risk.

gemini-cli.name: Gemini CLI
gemini-cli.deprecation_notice: ⚠️ Risk Notice: This provider uses a subscription/OAuth session not officially licensed for proxy/router use. Account may be restricted or banned. Use at your own risk.

qoder.name: Qoder
qoder.deprecation_notice: ⚠️ Risk Notice: This provider uses a subscription/OAuth session not officially licensed for proxy/router use. Account may be restricted or banned. Use at your own risk.

openrouter.name: OpenRouter
openrouter.notice_text: Free tier: 27+ free models, no credit card needed, 200 req/day. After $10 credit: 1,000 req/day.

nvidia.name: NVIDIA NIM
nvidia.notice_text: Free access for NVIDIA Developer Program members (prototyping & testing).

ollama.name: Ollama Cloud
ollama.notice_text: Free tier: light usage, 1 cloud model at a time (limits reset every 5h & 7d). Pro $20/mo · Max $100/mo.

vertex.name: Vertex AI
vertex.notice_text: New Google Cloud accounts get $300 free credits. Requires GCP project + Service Account with Vertex AI API enabled.

gemini.name: Gemini
gemini.free_tier: Free tier: 15 RPM, 1M tokens/day on gemini-2.5-flash via AI Studio.

cloudflare-ai.name: Cloudflare
cloudflare-ai.notice_text: Workers AI free tier. Requires a Cloudflare API token and Account ID.

byteplus.name: BytePlus ModelArk
byteplus.notice_text: Free credits for new accounts. Access to Seed 2.0, Kimi K2 Thinking, GLM 4.7, GPT-OSS-120B models.

claude.name: Claude Code
claude.deprecation_notice: ⚠️ Risk Notice: This provider uses a subscription/OAuth session not officially licensed for proxy/router use. Account may be restricted or banned. Use at your own risk.

antigravity.name: Antigravity
antigravity.deprecation_notice: ⚠️ Risk Notice: This provider uses a subscription/OAuth session not officially licensed for proxy/router use. Account may be restricted or banned. Use at your own risk.

codex.name: OpenAI Codex
codex.deprecation_notice: ⚠️ Risk Notice: This provider uses a subscription/OAuth session not officially licensed for proxy/router use. Account may be restricted or banned. Use at your own risk.

github.name: GitHub Copilot
github.deprecation_notice: ⚠️ Risk Notice: This provider uses a subscription/OAuth session not officially licensed for proxy/router use. Account may be restricted or banned. Use at your own risk.

xiaomi-tokenplan.name: Xiaomi MiMo (Token Plan)
xiaomi-tokenplan.notice_text: Xiaomi MiMo Token Plan subscription (API key starts with tp-). Token Plan keys are cluster-specific — select the region matching your subscription.

vercel-ai-gateway.name: Vercel AI Gateway
vercel-ai-gateway.notice_text: Unified OpenAI-compatible endpoint from Vercel. Use your AI Gateway API key, then pick models with provider/model IDs like anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.6 or openai/gpt-5.4.

opencode-go.name: OpenCode Go
opencode-go.notice_text: OpenCode Go subscription: $5/mo (then $10/mo). Access to Kimi, GLM, Qwen, MiMo, MiniMax models.

commandcode.name: Command Code
commandcode.notice_text: Use your CommandCode CLI API key (starts with user_...) from ~/.commandcode/auth.json or commandcode.ai/studio.

deepgram.name: Deepgram
deepgram.notice_text: $200 free credit on signup (no card required). Aura-1: $0.015/1k chars, Aura-2: $0.030/1k chars (Pay-As-You-Go).

nanobanana.name: NanoBanana API
nanobanana.notice_text: 3rd-party proxy for Google Nano Banana (Gemini 2.5/3 Flash Image). For official, use Gemini provider.

inworld.name: Inworld TTS
inworld.notice_text: Free tier: 40 minutes/month TTS. Paid: TTS-1.5 Mini $0.01/min ($15/1M chars), TTS-1.5 Max $0.025/min ($30/1M chars). 270+ voices, 15 languages.

aws-polly.name: AWS Polly
aws-polly.notice_text: Use AWS Secret Access Key as API key; set providerSpecificData.accessKeyId and optional region.

jina-ai.name: Jina AI
jina-ai.notice_text: 10M free tokens on signup (non-commercial), no credit card required.
